## Intent of the project/folder
This bridge exposes a local native ds4 agent through a Responses-shaped HTTP API.

## Current state
Key files read: README.md, agent/ds4_wrapper.py, src/server.c, tests/.

## Potential improvements
1. Fault injection suite - Effort: Medium, Benefit: High
2. Second harness contract proof - Effort: Low, Benefit: High
